# Introduction
## AI for Educators: Leveraging Narrative Generation to Enhance Project Brief and Podcast Creation

Welcome to the **Base Track** for EdTech, tailored specifically for AI for Educators applications. This track enables educators to harness the power of narrative generation to create comprehensive project briefs and engaging podcasts.

## Goal
By leveraging sovereign reasoning tools and autonomous data analysis, this course aims to equip educators with a robust framework for crafting effective project briefs and producing high-quality podcast content.

## Step-by-Step Guide

### 1. Upload and Prepare Clean Data
Upload your cleaned structured dataset from Session 01 into **NotebookLM** to autonomously generate a Project Brief and Audio Overview.

### 2. Initialize Notebook
Open up **NotebookLM** and create a notebook titled "AI for Educators Industry Brief".

### 3. Integrate AI-Generated Insights
Add Source: Upload your cleaned structured CSV/Sheets data.

### 4. Generate Project Brief and Podcast
Click "Project Brief" in the Notebook Guide.
Generate Audio Overview by opening the Audio Overview panel and clicking "Generate".
